title: Amelia Hamilton Moral Support Work In Progress
description: Amelia’s got your coat but she hasn’t pulled. In fact she’s turned, comedy outlaw. Each one of her new rap lines is a deadly bullet in her lyrical revolver. It’s 2026 and we are living in a new wild west where the old rules don’t apply. To put it bluntly she’s sick of doing what you're supposed to. Tired of being told what is right. Her show Moral Support is an electrifying rap manifesto for anyone who has had enough and wants to fight back. Saddle up and bring your whisky. Amelia is gonna show you that the good guys were actually the bad girls all along.
